records.event_description: An annual flagship gathering that brings together visionary founders, technology leaders, and policymakers within the UAE ecosystem to discuss digital integration, sustainable growth strategies, and cross-border commercial scaling.
records.event_location: Abu Dhabi National Exhibition Centre (ADNEC), Abu Dhabi, UAE
featured_speakers: H.E. Mohamed Ali Al Shorafa (Keynote Speaker)
Dr. Aisha Bin Bishr (Digital Transformation Expert)
event_requirements: Active commercial license preferred for networking lounge access
records.searchable_content: Abu Dhabi SME Innovation Forum 2026 is a Business Strategy & Innovation forum and panel discussion designed for startups and SMEs in the Launch, Growth, and Expansion stages to explore digital integration, sustainable growth strategies, and cross-border commercial scaling. Organized by the Department of Economic Development (DED) and Khalifa Fund, this flagship in-person event offers valuable networking opportunities with technology leaders and policymakers within the UAE ecosystem.

records.event_description: A collaborative hands-on technical workshop and networking mixer linking disruptive fintech startups with regional banking entities, compliance experts, and regulatory sandbox frameworks in Abu Dhabi.
records.event_location: Hub71, Al Maryah Island, Abu Dhabi, UAE
event_requirements: Open to tech entrepreneurs, developers, and financial analysts
Submission of a baseline fintech product concept is highly recommended
records.searchable_content: FinTech Sandbox Interactive Meetup is a Finance & Investment networking event and workshop tailored for tech entrepreneurs and developers in the Idea and Launch stages. The meetup connects disruptive fintech startups with regional banking entities, compliance experts, and regulatory sandbox frameworks in Abu Dhabi, facilitating technical validation, regulatory alignment, and venture capital engagement at Hub71.

records.event_title: AI Adoption and Corporate Matchmaking Web-Summit
records.event_description: A high-impact virtual summit tailored for scalable tech ventures looking to pitch their artificial intelligence, data analytics, and automation solutions directly to enterprise buyers and public sector procurement managers.
records.event_location: Virtual / Cisco Webex Link provided upon confirmation
event_requirements: Must be a verified tech company on the eJP platform
Requires a finalized corporate deck and working software MVP
records.searchable_content: AI Adoption and Corporate Matchmaking Web-Summit is a Technology & Digital Systems online event designed for scalable tech ventures in the Growth, Expansion, and Optimization stages. The digital summit allows businesses to pitch artificial intelligence, data analytics, and automation solutions directly to enterprise buyers and public sector procurement managers, strengthening B2B growth and corporate partnerships.
